title: Fourier Epicycle Machine
description: Draw any shape and watch spinning circles reconstruct it via Discrete Fourier Transform — tune terms in real time.
concept: Any closed path can be broken into rotating circles (epicycles). This app computes the DFT of your drawing, then animates the sorted Fourier components from largest to smallest — each circle spinning at its own frequency and radius. Drag the Terms slider to add or remove epicycles and watch the path grow sharper. A frequency spectrum bar shows which components are active.
features: Freehand draw mode — any shape you sketch is DFT-analyzed
Smooth epicycle animation with orbit rings and colour-graded spokes
Terms slider — live tune 1 to 256 epicycles while animating
5 parametric presets: Heart, Star, Lemniscate, Rose Curve, Epicycloid
Frequency spectrum bar at the bottom — active bands lit in purple
PNG export — download the current canvas frame
LocalStorage persistence — last drawn path restored on reload

interaction.mouse: Click and drag to draw a path; hover over preset buttons on the right
interaction.click: Draw → Animate switches modes; preset buttons auto-load shapes
